cover_letter: 
extra_context:
jobText: Gensler's Brand Design studio is seeking an entry level candidate with a background in graphic design and some prior experience designing and documenting environmental graphics, creating illustrations and murals. Responsibilities include contributing from concept to execution of environmental graphic design, illustration, and murals for projects in the built environment, supporting multiple design teams, supporting design intent packages with specifications materials details and locations, and collaborating with multiple internal design practices including workplace retail education and health and wellness. Qualifications include a Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design Industrial Design Interior Design or similar, 1 to 3 years of related experience in environmental graphics illustration murals and designing user-experience based environments, proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite Illustrator InDesign Photoshop and CAD tools, with Sketchup and Revit as a plus.
